source_sections.label: Official Updates
source_sections.description: Product, research, and platform updates from official vendor or lab channels.

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary_short: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces

topic_refs.headline: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more

items.title_zh: Lyria 3 Pro：在更多 Google 产品中创作更长音轨
items.summary_short_zh: 推出 Lyria 3 Pro，可生成具备结构感知的更长音轨。我们还将把 Lyria 带到更多 Google 产品和入口中

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary_short: Google Lyria teaser

topic_refs.headline: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more

items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_short_zh: Google Lyria 预告

items.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
items.summary_short: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures

topic_refs.headline: Protecting people from harmful manipulation

items.title_zh: 保护人们免受有害操纵
items.summary_short_zh: Google DeepMind 研究 AI 在金融、健康等领域的有害操纵风险，并据此推出新的安全措施

items.title: Plan, divide, and conquer: How weak models excel at long context tasks
items.summary_short: As context windows grow, LLM performance degrades in unexpected ways. We show how a "Divide & Conquer" framework — breaking long documents into parallel chunks with a planner, workers, and manager — lets smaller models like Llama-3-70B and Qwen-72B outperform GPT-4o single-shot

topic_refs.headline: Plan, divide, and conquer: How weak models excel at long context tasks

items.title_zh: 规划、拆分、各个击破：弱模型如何在长上下文任务中表现出色
items.summary_short_zh: 随着上下文窗口变大，LLM 的性能会以意想不到的方式下降。我们展示了一种“分而治之”框架——用规划器、工作器和管理器将长文档拆分为并行块——让 Llama-3-70B 和 Qwen-72B 等较小模型在单次推理中胜过 GPT-4o

source_sections.description_zh: 来自官方厂商或实验室渠道的产品、研究和平台更新。

source_sections.label: Market Signals
source_sections.description: Funding rounds, acquisitions, valuations, and strategic moves in the AI industry.
source_sections.description_zh: AI 行业中的融资轮次、收购、估值和战略动向。

source_sections.label: Expert Analysis
source_sections.description: Long-form expert analysis and research explainers with substantive depth.

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary_short: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput

topic_refs.headline: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly

items.title_zh: AI 系统学会让仓库机器人交通顺畅运行
items.summary_short_zh: 这种新方法会动态决定每一时刻哪些机器人应优先通行，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary_short: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring
items.title_zh: 用计算机视觉增强公民科学中的鱼类监测
items.summary_short_zh: MIT Sea Grant 与 Woodwell Climate Research Center 及其他合作方合作，展示了一套基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary_short: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment
items.title_zh: 腕带让佩戴者用自身动作控制机械手
items.summary_short_zh: 用户通过移动手和手指，可以指挥机器人弹钢琴、投篮球，或在虚拟环境中操控物体

source_sections.description_zh: 具有实质深度的长篇专家分析和研究解读。

source_sections.label: Research Papers
source_sections.description: Research papers and paper-trending signals tied to the current day.

items.title: Why Does Self-Distillation (Sometimes) Degrade the Reasoning Capability of LLMs?
items.summary_short: Self-distillation has emerged as an effective post-training paradigm for LLMs, often improving performance while shortening reasoning traces. However, in mathematical reasoning, we find that it can reduce response length while degrading performance.

topic_refs.headline: Why Does Self-Distillation (Sometimes) Degrade the Reasoning Capability of LLMs?

items.title_zh: 为什么自蒸馏（有时）会削弱 LLM 的推理能力？
items.summary_short_zh: 自蒸馏已成为 LLM 一种有效的后训练范式，通常能在缩短推理轨迹的同时提升性能。然而，我们发现，在数学推理中，它可能在缩短回答长度的同时降低表现。

items.title: A Theory of LLM Information Susceptibility
items.summary_short: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as optimization modules in agentic systems, yet the fundamental limits of such LLM-mediated improvement remain poorly understood.

topic_refs.headline: A Theory of LLM Information Susceptibility

items.title_zh: LLM 信息易感性理论
items.summary_short_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）正越来越多地作为智能体系统中的优化模块部署，但这种由 LLM 介导的改进的根本极限仍缺乏充分理解。

items.title: HDPO: Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization via Privileged Self-Distillation
items.summary_short: Large language models trained with reinforcement learning (RL) for mathematical reasoning face a fundamental challenge: on problems the model cannot solve at all - "cliff" prompts - the RL gradient vanishes entirely, preventing any learning signal from reaching these failure modes.

topic_refs.headline: HDPO: Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization via Privileged Self-Distillation

items.title_zh: HDPO：通过特权自蒸馏实现混合蒸馏策略优化
items.summary_short_zh: 针对数学推理进行强化学习（RL）训练的大语言模型面临一个根本挑战：对于模型完全无法解决的问题——“悬崖”提示——RL 梯度会完全消失，导致学习信号无法到达这些失败模式。

items.title: DVM: Real-Time Kernel Generation for Dynamic AI Models
items.summary_short: Dynamism is common in AI computation, e.g., the dynamic tensor shapes and the dynamic control flows in models.

topic_refs.headline: DVM: Real-Time Kernel Generation for Dynamic AI Models

items.title_zh: DVM：面向动态 AI 模型的实时内核生成
items.summary_short_zh: 动态性在 AI 计算中很常见，例如模型中的动态张量形状和动态控制流。

items.title: Deep Neural Regression Collapse
items.summary_short: Neural Collapse is a phenomenon that helps identify sparse and low rank structures in deep classifiers. Recent work has extended the definition of neural collapse to regression problems, albeit only measuring the phenomenon at the last layer.

topic_refs.headline: Deep Neural Regression Collapse

items.title_zh: 深度神经回归塌缩
items.summary_short_zh: 神经塌缩是一种有助于识别深度分类器中稀疏和低秩结构的现象。近期工作已将神经塌缩的定义扩展到回归问题，但仅测量了最后一层中的该现象。

items.title: Beyond Masks: Efficient, Flexible Diffusion Language Models via Deletion-Insertion Processes
items.summary_short: While Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) relying on token masking and unmasking have shown promise in language modeling, their computational efficiency and generation flexibility remain constrained by the masking paradigm.

topic_refs.headline: Beyond Masks: Efficient, Flexible Diffusion Language Models via Deletion-Insertion Processes

items.title_zh: 超越 Mask：通过删除-插入过程实现高效、灵活的扩散语言模型
items.summary_short_zh: 依赖 token 掩码与去掩码的 Masked Diffusion Language Models（MDLM）虽在语言建模中展现出潜力，但其计算效率和生成灵活性仍受限于掩码范式。

items.title: Attention-aware Inference Optimizations for Large Vision-Language Models with Memory-efficient Decoding
items.summary_short: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success in multi-modal reasoning, but their inference time efficiency remains a significant challenge due to the memory overhead during decoding, especially when the query and answer of VLMs consist of long sequences of visual and text

topic_refs.headline: Attention-aware Inference Optimizations for Large Vision-Language Models with Memory-efficient Decoding

items.title_zh: 面向大视觉语言模型的注意力感知推理优化：基于内存高效解码
items.summary_short_zh: 大型视觉语言模型（VLM）在多模态推理中取得了显著成功，但其推理时效率仍是一大挑战，原因在于解码期间的内存开销，尤其当 VLM 的查询和回答由长视觉与文本序列组成时。

items.title: Evidence for Limited Metacognition in LLMs
items.summary_short: The possibility of LLM self-awareness and even sentience is gaining increasing public attention and has major safety and policy implications, but the science of measuring them is still in a nascent state.

topic_refs.headline: Evidence for Limited Metacognition in LLMs

items.title_zh: LLM 元认知有限的证据
items.summary_short_zh: LLM 是否具备自我意识甚至知觉的可能性正日益受到公众关注，并具有重大的安全和政策影响，但对其进行测量的科学仍处于起步阶段。

items.title: Diet Your LLM: Dimension-wise Global Pruning of LLMs via Merging Task-specific Importance Score
items.summary_short: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but their massive scale poses significant challenges for practical deployment.

topic_refs.headline: Diet Your LLM: Dimension-wise Global Pruning of LLMs via Merging Task-specific Importance Score

items.title_zh: 给你的 LLM 节食：通过合并任务特定重要性分数对 LLM 进行按维度全局剪枝
items.summary_short_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）已展现出卓越能力，但其庞大规模给实际部署带来了重大挑战。

items.title: Circuit Complexity of Hierarchical Knowledge Tracing and Implications for Log-Precision Transformers
items.summary_short: Knowledge tracing models mastery over interconnected concepts, often organized by prerequisites. We analyze hierarchical prerequisite propagation through a circuit-complexity lens to clarify what is provable about transformer-style computation on deep concept hierarchies.

topic_refs.headline: Circuit Complexity of Hierarchical Knowledge Tracing and Implications for Log-Precision Transformers

items.title_zh: 分层知识追踪的电路复杂性及其对对数精度 Transformer 的启示
items.summary_short_zh: 知识追踪模型对相互关联的概念进行掌握建模，这些概念通常按先修关系组织。我们从电路复杂性的视角分析分层先修关系传播，以阐明在深层概念层级上，关于 Transformer 风格计算有哪些是可证明的。

items.title: Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection
items.summary_short: Gradient boosting, a method of building additive ensembles from weak learners, has established itself as a practical and theoretically-motivated approach to approximate functions, especially using decision tree weak learners.

topic_refs.headline: Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection

items.title_zh: 像（Var）Pro 一样 Boost：通过变量投影实现信赖域梯度提升
items.summary_short_zh: 梯度提升是一种利用弱学习器构建加性集成的方法，已成为一种兼具实用性和理论动机的函数逼近方法，尤其是在使用决策树作为弱学习器时。

items.title: Identification of NMF by choosing maximum-volume basis vectors
items.summary_short: In nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF), minimum-volume-constrained NMF is a widely used framework for identifying the solution of NMF by making basis vectors as similar as possible. This typically induces sparsity in the coefficient matrix, with each row containing zero entries.
authors: Peter G. M. van der Heijden

topic_refs.headline: Identification of NMF by choosing maximum-volume basis vectors

items.title_zh: 通过选择最大体积基向量识别 NMF
items.summary_short_zh: 在非负矩阵分解（NMF）中，带最小体积约束的 NMF 是一种广泛使用的框架，通过让基向量尽可能相似来识别 NMF 的解。这通常会在系数矩阵中诱导稀疏性，使每一行都包含零元素。

items.title: larksuite/cli
items.summary_short: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills

items.summary_short_zh: 由 larksuite 团队维护的官方 Lark/Feishu CLI 工具——为人类和 AI Agents 打造。覆盖 Messenger、Docs、Base、Sheets、Calendar、Mail、Tasks、Meetings 等核心业务领域，提供 200+ 命令和 19 项 AI Agent Skills

items.title: Arthur-Ficial/apfel
items.summary_short: Apple Intelligence from the command line. On-device LLM via FoundationModels framework. No API keys, no cloud, no dependencies

items.summary_short_zh: 命令行中的 Apple Intelligence。通过 FoundationModels framework 在设备端运行 LLM。无需 API key，无需云端，无依赖

topics.headline: Attention-aware Inference Optimizations for Large Vision-Language Models with Memory-efficient Decoding
topics.summary_short: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success in multi-modal reasoning, but their inference time efficiency remains a significant challenge due to the memory overhead during decoding, especially when the query and answer of VLMs consist of long sequences of visual and text
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Attention-aware Inference Optimizations for Large Vision-Language Models with Memory-efficient Decoding
evidence.title_zh: 面向大视觉语言模型的注意力感知推理优化与内存高效解码

topics.headline_zh: 面向大视觉语言模型的注意力感知推理优化与内存高效解码
topics.summary_short_zh: 大型视觉语言模型（VLM）在多模态推理方面取得了显著成功，但其推理时间效率仍是一个重大挑战，原因在于解码期间的内存开销，尤其当 VLM 的查询和回答由较长的视觉与文本序列组成时。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Beyond Masks: Efficient, Flexible Diffusion Language Models via Deletion-Insertion Processes
topics.summary_short: While Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) relying on token masking and unmasking have shown promise in language modeling, their computational efficiency and generation flexibility remain constrained by the masking paradigm.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Beyond Masks: Efficient, Flexible Diffusion Language Models via Deletion-Insertion Processes
evidence.title_zh: 超越 Mask：通过删除-插入过程实现高效、灵活的扩散语言模型

topics.headline_zh: 超越 Mask：通过删除-插入过程实现高效、灵活的扩散语言模型
topics.summary_short_zh: 尽管依赖 token 掩码与去掩码的 Masked Diffusion Language Models（MDLM）在语言建模中展现出潜力，但其计算效率和生成灵活性仍受限于掩码范式。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection
topics.summary_short: Gradient boosting, a method of building additive ensembles from weak learners, has established itself as a practical and theoretically-motivated approach to approximate functions, especially using decision tree weak learners.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection
evidence.title_zh: 像（Var）Pro 一样 Boost：通过变量投影实现信赖域梯度提升

topics.headline_zh: 像（Var）Pro 一样 Boost：通过变量投影实现信赖域梯度提升
topics.summary_short_zh: 梯度提升是一种由弱学习器构建加性集成的方法，已成为一种兼具实用性和理论依据的函数逼近方法，尤其是在使用决策树弱学习器时。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: CGRL: Causal-Guided Representation Learning for Graph Out-of-Distribution Generalization
topics.summary_short: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved impressive performance in graph-related tasks. However, they suffer from poor generalization on out-of-distribution (OOD) data, as they tend to learn spurious correlations.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: CGRL: Causal-Guided Representation Learning for Graph Out-of-Distribution Generalization
evidence.title_zh: CGRL：用于图分布外泛化的因果引导表示学习

topics.headline_zh: CGRL：用于图分布外泛化的因果引导表示学习
topics.summary_short_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在图相关任务中取得了令人瞩目的表现。然而，它们在分布外（OOD）数据上的泛化能力较差，因为它们往往会学习到伪相关。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Circuit Complexity of Hierarchical Knowledge Tracing and Implications for Log-Precision Transformers
topics.summary_short: Knowledge tracing models mastery over interconnected concepts, often organized by prerequisites. We analyze hierarchical prerequisite propagation through a circuit-complexity lens to clarify what is provable about transformer-style computation on deep concept hierarchies.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Circuit Complexity of Hierarchical Knowledge Tracing and Implications for Log-Precision Transformers
evidence.title_zh: 分层知识追踪的电路复杂性及其对对数精度 Transformers 的启示

topics.headline_zh: 分层知识追踪的电路复杂性及其对对数精度 Transformers 的启示
topics.summary_short_zh: 知识追踪对相互关联的概念掌握情况进行建模，这些概念通常按先修关系组织。我们从电路复杂性的视角分析分层先修关系传播，以阐明在深层概念层级上，关于 transformer 风格计算有哪些是可以被证明的。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Cost-Sensitive Neighborhood Aggregation for Heterophilous Graphs: When Does Per-Edge Routing Help?
topics.summary_short: Recent work distinguishes two heterophily regimes: adversarial, where cross-class edges dilute class signal and harm classification, and informative, where the heterophilous structure itself carries useful signal.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Cost-Sensitive Neighborhood Aggregation for Heterophilous Graphs: When Does Per-Edge Routing Help?
evidence.title_zh: 面向异配图的成本敏感邻域聚合：逐边路由何时有帮助？

topics.headline_zh: 面向异配图的成本敏感邻域聚合：逐边路由何时有帮助？
topics.summary_short_zh: 近期研究区分了两种异配性情形：对抗型，即跨类别边会稀释类别信号并损害分类；信息型，即异配结构本身携带有用信号。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Deep Neural Regression Collapse
topics.summary_short: Neural Collapse is a phenomenon that helps identify sparse and low rank structures in deep classifiers. Recent work has extended the definition of neural collapse to regression problems, albeit only measuring the phenomenon at the last layer.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Deep Neural Regression Collapse
evidence.title_zh: 深度神经回归塌缩

topics.summary_short_zh: Neural Collapse 是一种有助于识别深度分类器中稀疏和低秩结构的现象。近期研究已将 neural collapse 的定义扩展到回归问题，但目前仅测量最后一层中的该现象。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Diet Your LLM: Dimension-wise Global Pruning of LLMs via Merging Task-specific Importance Score
topics.summary_short: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but their massive scale poses significant challenges for practical deployment.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Diet Your LLM: Dimension-wise Global Pruning of LLMs via Merging Task-specific Importance Score
evidence.title_zh: 给你的 LLM 节食：通过合并任务特定重要性分数进行 LLM 按维度全局剪枝

topics.headline_zh: 给你的 LLM 节食：通过合并任务特定重要性分数进行 LLM 按维度全局剪枝
topics.summary_short_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）展现了卓越能力，但其庞大规模给实际部署带来了重大挑战。

topics.headline: DVM: Real-Time Kernel Generation for Dynamic AI Models
topics.summary_short: Dynamism is common in AI computation, e.g., the dynamic tensor shapes and the dynamic control flows in models.

evidence.title: DVM: Real-Time Kernel Generation for Dynamic AI Models
evidence.title_zh: DVM：面向动态 AI 模型的实时内核生成

topics.summary_short_zh: 动态性在 AI 计算中很常见，例如模型中的动态张量形状和动态控制流。

topics.headline: Evidence for Limited Metacognition in LLMs
topics.summary_short: The possibility of LLM self-awareness and even sentience is gaining increasing public attention and has major safety and policy implications, but the science of measuring them is still in a nascent state.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Evidence for Limited Metacognition in LLMs
evidence.title_zh: LLM 中有限元认知的证据

topics.headline_zh: LLM 中有限元认知的证据
topics.summary_short_zh: LLM 自我意识甚至感知能力的可能性正日益受到公众关注，并具有重大的安全和政策影响，但衡量这些能力的科学仍处于起步阶段。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: HDPO: Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization via Privileged Self-Distillation
topics.summary_short: Large language models trained with reinforcement learning (RL) for mathematical reasoning face a fundamental challenge: on problems the model cannot solve at all - "cliff" prompts - the RL gradient vanishes entirely, preventing any learning signal from reaching these failure modes.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: HDPO: Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization via Privileged Self-Distillation
evidence.title_zh: HDPO：通过特权自蒸馏实现混合蒸馏策略优化

topics.headline_zh: HDPO：通过特权自蒸馏实现混合蒸馏策略优化
topics.summary_short_zh: 针对数学推理进行强化学习（RL）训练的大语言模型面临一个根本挑战：对于模型完全无法解决的问题——“悬崖”提示——RL 梯度会完全消失，导致任何学习信号都无法到达这些失败模式。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Identification of NMF by choosing maximum-volume basis vectors
topics.summary_short: In nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF), minimum-volume-constrained NMF is a widely used framework for identifying the solution of NMF by making basis vectors as similar as possible. This typically induces sparsity in the coefficient matrix, with each row containing zero entries.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Identification of NMF by choosing maximum-volume basis vectors
evidence.title_zh: 通过选择最大体积基向量识别 NMF

topics.headline_zh: 通过选择最大体积基向量识别 NMF
topics.summary_short_zh: 在非负矩阵分解（NMF）中，最小体积约束 NMF 是一种广泛使用的框架，通过使基向量尽可能相似来识别 NMF 的解。这通常会在系数矩阵中诱导稀疏性，使每一行都包含零项。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

x_buzz.title: Plan, divide, and conquer: How weak models excel at long context tasks
x_buzz.summary: As context windows grow, LLM performance degrades in unexpected ways. We show how a "Divide & Conquer" framework — breaking long documents into parallel chunks with a planner, workers, and manager — lets smaller models like Llama-3-70B and Qwen-72B outperform GPT-4o single-shot.
x_buzz.linked_topic: Plan, divide, and conquer: How weak models excel at long context tasks
